scripts.build: pnpm --filter @paperless-dedupe/core build && pnpm --filter @paperless-dedupe/sdk build && pnpm --filter @paperless-dedupe/cli build && pnpm --filter @paperless-dedupe/web build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @paperless-dedupe/core check && pnpm --filter @paperless-dedupe/sdk check && pnpm --filter @paperless-dedupe/cli check && pnpm --filter @paperless-dedupe/web check
scripts.docker:validate: docker build -t paperless-ngx-dedupe:local . && docker compose -f compose.dev.yml up --force-recreate --abort-on-container-exit
scripts.docker:dev: docker compose -f compose.dev.yml --profile dev up dev --build
